## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the local checks and they pass:
      `apm marketplace check` · `apm pack --check-versions --check-clean --dry-run`
- [ ] New/changed agents have a `description` in frontmatter and a body under ~300 lines.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or internal-only information (this repo is **public**).
- [ ] If I changed `apm.yml`, I regenerated `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` (`apm pack`).
- [ ] Docs updated if the change affects how cortex is used or extended.
